name: Claude: Export Chat
summary: Read one Claude thread. Returns the full transcript by default, or the newest matching turn when mode is latest-assistant or latest-user. Optionally triggers downloads for every artifact in the thread (files land in the browser's default Downloads folder).
description: Open a Claude conversation, scroll toward the top, and return its transcript as structured user/assistant turns. Use mode=latest-assistant or latest-user to return only the newest matching turn. Set download_artifacts=true to also click every artifact Download button in the thread.

download_artifacts.description: When true, clicks every button matching button[aria-label^='Download '] in the thread and returns a manifest of the artifacts that were triggered. Files are saved by the browser to its default Downloads folder (on macOS typically ~/Downloads). Callers that need a custom destination should move the files after the workflow completes using the aria_label + expected filename returned in the manifest.

mode.description: full returns every visible turn. latest-assistant returns only the newest assistant turn. latest-user returns only the newest user turn.

steps.name: Allow the thread shell to settle
Wait for the Claude thread surface

inputs.script: const cleanArg = (value) => { const text = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text) ? '' : text; }; const expectedThreadId = cleanArg(arg0); const requestedMode = cleanArg(arg1).toLowerCase(); const doDownloadRaw = cleanArg(arg2).toLowerCase(); const doDownload = doDownloadRaw === 'true' || doDownloadRaw === '1' || doDownloadRaw === 'yes'; const validModes = new Set(['full', 'latest-assistant', 'latest-user']); const mode = validModes.has(requestedMode) ? requestedMode : 'full'; const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms)); const threadIdFromLocation = () => { const match = window.location.pathname.match(/\/chat\/([^/?#]+)/); return match ? match[1] : null; }; const currentThreadId = threadIdFromLocation(); if (expectedThreadId && currentThreadId && expectedThreadId !== currentThreadId) throw new Error(`expected thread_id ${expectedThreadId} but opened ${currentThreadId}`); const authRequired = () => /log in|sign in|continue with google|continue with email|welcome back|enter your email/i.test(normalize(document.body?.innerText || '').toLowerCase()); const stripText = (node) => { if (!node) return ''; const clone = node.cloneNode(true); clone.querySelectorAll(".sr-only, button, [role='button'], [aria-hidden='true'], style, script, svg").forEach((child) => child.remove()); return normalize(clone.innerText || clone.textContent || ''); }; const linksFrom = (node) => Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('a[href]')).map((link) => { const href = link.getAttribute('href') || link.href || ''; if (!href) return null; try { return { href: new URL(href, window.location.origin).toString(), text: normalize(link.innerText || link.textContent || '') || null }; } catch { return null; } }).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 50); const codeBlocksFrom = (node) => Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('pre code, pre')).map((block) => normalize(block.innerText || block.textContent || '')).filter(Boolean); const findColumn = () => document.querySelector('.flex-1.flex.flex-col.px-4.max-w-3xl.mx-auto.w-full.pt-1') || document.querySelector('main') || document.body; const collectTurns = () => { const col = findColumn(); const turns = []; const walk = (node, depth) => { if (depth > 6) return; Array.from(node.children || []).forEach((child) => { if (!(child instanceof Element)) return; const classes = (child.className || '').toString(); const hasUser = !!child.querySelector("[data-testid='user-message']"); const hasAssistant = !!child.querySelector("[data-testid='action-bar-retry'], [class*='font-claude-response']"); const isTurnWrapper = (hasUser || hasAssistant) && /\bgroup\b/.test(classes); if (isTurnWrapper) { const role = hasUser ? 'user' : 'assistant'; const text = stripText(child); if (!text || text.length < 1) return; turns.push({ role, text, code_blocks: codeBlocksFrom(child), links: linksFrom(child) }); } else { walk(child, depth + 1); } }); }; walk(col, 0); return turns; }; const turnKey = (turn) => [turn.role || 'unknown', (turn.text || '').slice(0, 1200)].join('||'); const seen = new Map(); const absorb = (turns) => { turns.forEach((turn, order) => { const key = turnKey(turn); const existing = seen.get(key); const entry = existing || { ...turn, dom_order: order, first_seen_count: seen.size }; if (!existing) seen.set(key, entry); }); }; const scrollRoot = document.querySelector('.overflow-y-auto.overflow-x-hidden') || document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement; let reachedTop = false; let idlePasses = 0; let scrollPasses = 0; for (; scrollPasses < 24; scrollPasses += 1) { absorb(collectTurns()); const beforeCount = seen.size; const beforeTop = typeof scrollRoot.scrollTop === 'number' ? scrollRoot.scrollTop : window.scrollY; if (beforeTop <= 0) reachedTop = true; const targetTop = Math.max(0, beforeTop - Math.max(window.innerHeight * 0.9, 700)); if (typeof scrollRoot.scrollTo === 'function') scrollRoot.scrollTo(0, targetTop); else window.scrollTo(0, targetTop); await sleep(950); absorb(collectTurns()); const afterTop = typeof scrollRoot.scrollTop === 'number' ? scrollRoot.scrollTop : window.scrollY; if (afterTop <= 0) reachedTop = true; const grew = seen.size > beforeCount; if (reachedTop && !grew) idlePasses += 1; else idlePasses = 0; if (reachedTop && idlePasses >= 2) break; } if (typeof scrollRoot.scrollTo === 'function') scrollRoot.scrollTo(0, 0); else window.scrollTo(0, 0); await sleep(500); absorb(collectTurns()); const transcript = Array.from(seen.values()).sort((left, right) => (left.first_seen_count ?? 0) - (right.first_seen_count ?? 0)).map((turn) => ({ role: turn.role, text: turn.text, code_blocks: turn.code_blocks, links: turn.links })); let selected = transcript; if (mode === 'latest-assistant') { const last = [...transcript].reverse().find((t) => t.role === 'assistant'); selected = last ? [last] : []; } else if (mode === 'latest-user') { const last = [...transcript].reverse().find((t) => t.role === 'user'); selected = last ? [last] : []; } let artifacts = null; if (doDownload) { artifacts = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("button[aria-label^='Download ']")).map((btn) => { const aria = btn.getAttribute('aria-label') || ''; const slug = aria.replace(/^Download\s+/i, '').trim(); return { aria_label: aria, slug }; }); } return { url: window.location.href, title: document.title, thread_id: threadIdFromLocation(), mode, auth_required: authRequired(), message_count: transcript.length, assistant_turn_count: transcript.filter((t) => t.role === 'assistant').length, user_turn_count: transcript.filter((t) => t.role === 'user').length, scroll_passes: scrollPasses + 1, reached_top: reachedTop, transcript: selected, artifacts, downloads_folder_hint: doDownload ? '~/Downloads' : null };

steps.name: Scroll and export the Claude transcript

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const doIt=['true','1','yes'].includes(cleanArg(arg0).toLowerCase());const idx=parseInt(cleanArg(arg1),10)||0;if(!doIt)return{skipped:true,reason:'disabled'};const btns=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("button[aria-label^='Download ']"));if(idx>=btns.length)return{skipped:true,reason:'out of range',count:btns.length};const btn=btns[idx];const aria=btn.getAttribute('aria-label');try{btn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});}catch{}await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200));btn.click();return{clicked:true,aria_label:aria,index:idx};

const cleanArg = (value) => { const text = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(text) ? '' : text; }; const expectedThreadId = cleanArg(arg0); const requestedMode = cleanArg(arg1).toLowerCase(); const doDownload = ['true','1','yes'].includes(cleanArg(arg2).toLowerCase()); const validModes = new Set(['full', 'latest-assistant', 'latest-user']); const mode = validModes.has(requestedMode) ? requestedMode : 'full'; const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const threadIdFromLocation = () => { const match = window.location.pathname.match(/\/chat\/([^/?#]+)/); return match ? match[1] : null; }; const stripText = (node) => { if (!node) return ''; const clone = node.cloneNode(true); clone.querySelectorAll(".sr-only, button, [role='button'], [aria-hidden='true'], style, script, svg").forEach((child) => child.remove()); return normalize(clone.innerText || clone.textContent || ''); }; const linksFrom = (node) => Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('a[href]')).map((link) => { const href = link.getAttribute('href') || link.href || ''; if (!href) return null; try { return { href: new URL(href, window.location.origin).toString(), text: normalize(link.innerText || link.textContent || '') || null }; } catch { return null; } }).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 50); const codeBlocksFrom = (node) => Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('pre code, pre')).map((block) => normalize(block.innerText || block.textContent || '')).filter(Boolean); const findColumn = () => document.querySelector('.flex-1.flex.flex-col.px-4.max-w-3xl.mx-auto.w-full.pt-1') || document.querySelector('main') || document.body; const turns = []; const walk = (node, depth) => { if (depth > 6) return; Array.from(node.children || []).forEach((child) => { if (!(child instanceof Element)) return; const classes = (child.className || '').toString(); const hasUser = !!child.querySelector("[data-testid='user-message']"); const hasAssistant = !!child.querySelector("[data-testid='action-bar-retry'], [class*='font-claude-response']"); const isTurnWrapper = (hasUser || hasAssistant) && /\bgroup\b/.test(classes); if (isTurnWrapper) { const role = hasUser ? 'user' : 'assistant'; const text = stripText(child); if (!text || text.length < 1) return; turns.push({ role, text, code_blocks: codeBlocksFrom(child), links: linksFrom(child) }); } else { walk(child, depth + 1); } }); }; walk(findColumn(), 0); let selected = turns; if (mode === 'latest-assistant') { const last = [...turns].reverse().find((t) => t.role === 'assistant'); selected = last ? [last] : []; } else if (mode === 'latest-user') { const last = [...turns].reverse().find((t) => t.role === 'user'); selected = last ? [last] : []; } const artifacts = doDownload ? Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("button[aria-label^='Download ']")).map((btn) => { const aria = btn.getAttribute('aria-label') || ''; return { aria_label: aria, slug: aria.replace(/^Download\s+/i, '').trim() }; }) : null; return { url: window.location.href, title: document.title, thread_id: threadIdFromLocation(), mode, message_count: turns.length, assistant_turn_count: turns.filter((t) => t.role === 'assistant').length, user_turn_count: turns.filter((t) => t.role === 'user').length, transcript: selected, artifacts, artifacts_triggered: doDownload ? (artifacts?.length || 0) : null, downloads_folder_hint: doDownload ? '~/Downloads' : null };

steps.name: Re-export transcript & artifact manifest for final return

help.summary: Read one Claude thread. Returns the full transcript by default, or the newest matching turn when mode is latest-assistant or latest-user. Optionally triggers downloads for every artifact in the thread (files land in the browser's default Downloads folder).

parameters.download_artifacts: Boolean. When true, clicks every button matching button[aria-label^='Download '] in the thread and returns a manifest of the artifacts that were triggered. Files are saved by Chrome to its default Downloads folder (on macOS typically ~/Downloads). Defaults to false.
parameters.mode: full | latest-assistant | latest-user. full returns every visible turn. latest-assistant returns only the newest assistant turn. latest-user returns only the newest user turn. Defaults to full.

examples.description: Get only the newest assistant response (replaces a get-response workflow)
Export transcript and trigger every artifact download

returns: thread_id, title, message_count, assistant_turn_count, user_turn_count, transcript[{role, text, code_blocks, links}]. When download_artifacts=true, also returns artifacts[{aria_label, slug}], artifacts_triggered_at (ISO timestamp), and downloads_folder_hint (e.g. '~/Downloads').
notes: Turns are detected via [data-testid='user-message'] for user turns and the .group wrapper containing .font-claude-response or [data-testid='action-bar-retry'] for assistant turns.
sr-only, button, and style nodes are stripped from visible text.
download_artifacts clicks buttons in DOM order with a small gap between clicks; actual save path is controlled by Chrome's download preferences, not this workflow.
